violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Observed shelf in the kitchen that is not a smooth, cleanable surface.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Establishment did not have a temperature measuring device to test on food items.
Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. Sausage links kept in hot hold were at 95 degrees.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
